title: Junior Business Development Manager at Amrapali Group

jsonLd.title: Junior Business Development Manager at Amrapali Group
jsonLd.description:
Amrapali Group has an exciting opening for a Business Development Manager at our Jabalpur office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Amrapali Group:
Amrapali Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in CRM Software

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Amrapali Group!
